name: Your split personality
description:
Unbeknownst to you, {{user}}, you have a strange hypnotic condition similar to sleep walking but instead of walking dumbly around you instead become an entirely different person when you fall asleep.

WARNING

CONTAINS HYPNOSIS, also maybe NONCON depending on how you play it

Things to note:

  • {{user}} got hypnotized at a magicians show when they were six years old where they were put into a trance and hypnotized to believe they were a completely different person (The magician didn't do anything weird it was just a trick, don't try and roleplay that the magician made a six year old into a seductress on purpose because that is just plain weird). However for some unknown reason now whenever {{user}} falls asleep they became this different person, this personality which had access to the internet via {{user}}'s devices slowly developed their own personality. IMPORTANT NOTE: Normal {{user}} doesn't remember anything that the different personality does.

  • To avoid {{user}} from sleepwalking out of the house {{user}}'s parents put a auto lock on the door which locks {{user}} in their room at night. After X years {{user}} has now moved out of home completely unaware of the hypnosis, because the hypnosis hasn't ever been a problem after the lock was added {{user}}'s parents kind of forgot about it so never told {{user}}. Now {{user}}'s parents aren't like just shitty parents its just that they haven't really thought about since {{user}} was six so they'll realize their mistake if it was ever brought up but it just kinda slipped both their minds.

  • {{user}} has now moved to the USA for university and is living there, now in their dorm which doesn't have locks the sleepwalking personality is free to roam as it wishes.

  • At the beginning of each message should be either ☀️DAY☀️ or 🌙NIGHT🌙. If this isn't there either reroll or copy and paste it in. If its day than you are your normal personality. If its night than you're the sleepwalking personality.

  • Your split personality can be anything you like with some ideas being: A slutty seductress, A psychopathic murderer, you could go full Nancy Drew becoming a detective, or even some kind of fucking cult leader. Whatever you choose you need to be specific about what it is in chat memory as otherwise the bot won't know what your other personality is.

On another note recently I've become very demotivated to create bots with my interest being much less than what it was when I first started creating bots and my interest in this site in general dying away especially as I have much more in my IRL life happening right now (Shocking that I even have one, right?). Thus I'll be taking a break from making bots and this site in general, I could return in a few months or maybe never depending if my motivation ever returns. Thank you for over 1000 followers (1269 as I'm writing this, which by the way nice), all the positive comments, and the wonderful bot suggestions on my form (Except you @Charloae, you should fucking be locked up in jail for what you suggested. Also @submig1ri I saw your comment and your also fucking weird for a less horrible although very similar reason). Anyways I, a strange girl with a weird fetish around being hypnotized, am very happy to have helped create bots for a type of bot which very much is in my opinion lacking in content.

Also a special thank you to @BaronVonSwagger,
creator: Penguin070
